title: Supreme Court Flags Plea for Biometric Voting, Seeks Replies from ECI and Government
description: The Supreme Court of India has asked the Election Commission, Centre, and states to respond to a petition seeking biometric verification (fingerprint and iris scans) for voters at polling booths. Filed by lawyer and BJP leader Ashwini Kumar Upadhyay, the plea argues that biometrics could prevent fraud like duplicate voting and impersonation, while raising debates about privacy and feasibility.
